_comment: Real per-formation block geometry (#530): four lone player Infantry regiments, one per close-order stance, staged side by side and left to sit (drill mode, no opponent). NORMAL is the baseline 2:1 line; SQUARE restructures into a genuine square footprint with its perimeter facing outward on every side; SHIELD_WALL and TESTUDO tighten their grid spacing below the NORMAL/TIGHT floor. State-dumped (SPARTA_DEMO_STATE_FULL=1) at rest to verify the measured bbox aspect and per-soldier facings/spacing directly, per the #530 verification-sweep methodology.
